caption: We asked. You answered. And let's just say… there was no consensus. 😅 From 15mm fisheyes to 500mm telephotos, primes to zooms - turns out every creator has their own secret weapon for capturing action. Watch the full reel to see what our creators at our Vancouver #CanonCreatorLab had to say, then drop yours in the comments.
